name: Chicken Indienne
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chicken pieces with lemon juice and let stand 30 minutes.
2. Pat dry the chicken pieces.
3. In a bowl, mix flour, salt, and pepper to coat the chicken evenly.
4. Heat oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat until hot.
5. Add butter to the skillet and cook the chicken, sprinkling with any leftover flour mixture, until browned on both sides. Remove from the skillet and set aside.
6. Add chopped onion to the skillet and cook until golden.
7. Stir in curry powder and cook for 2 minutes.
8. Gradually add water and heavy cream, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens.
9. Mix in chicken stock base and ginger, then return the chicken to the skillet.
10. Cover the skillet and simmer over low heat, turning the chicken once, for 40 minutes or until cooked through.
11. Transfer the chicken to a heated platter and arrange lime wedges around it.
12. Serve with rice.
